items.title: Powerful magnitude 5.5 earthquake rattles western Nevada and northern California
items.text_preview: Residents in western Nevada and parts of California were rattled by a magnitude 5.5 earthquake on Monday evening. The U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) reported that the earthquake struck about 12 miles...

Powerful magnitude 5.5 earthquake rattles western Nevada and northern California

items.summary: A magnitude 5.5 earthquake struck western Nevada and northern California on Monday evening, approximately 12 miles southeast of Silver Springs, NV. The earthquake, with a depth of over 6.2 miles, triggered a ShakeAlert warning and was followed by more than 15 smaller aftershocks. There are currently no reports of damage or injuries from the earthquake.

Agustin Ramirez drives in four as Miami Marlins beat up on Atlanta Braves

Agustin Ramirez drives in 4 as Marlins beat up on Braves

items.summary: The Miami Marlins beat the Atlanta Braves 10-4 in the opener of their three-game series, with Agustin Ramirez driving in four runs, including a 420-foot three-run homer. The Marlins had 16 hits and scored 10 runs, breaking out of a slump after being swept by Detroit over the weekend. Andrew Nardi earned the win, while Aaron Bummer took the loss.

Long-time NFL coach Dave McGinnis dies at 74
Dave McGinnis, former Cardinals head coach and beloved Titans assistant, dead at 74

items.summary: Long-time NFL coach Dave McGinnis has died at the age of 74 due to a prolonged illness, specifically renal failure. McGinnis spent 30 years as an NFL head and assistant coach, serving as head coach of the Arizona Cardinals from 2000-03 and holding various coaching positions with the Chicago Bears, Tennessee Titans, and Los Angeles Rams. The Tennessee Titans announced his passing, with team owners and executives paying tribute to his legacy and character.

items.summary: The New York Times game Pips is a unique spin on dominoes, offering a single-player experience with color-coded conditions to address. The game has various difficulty levels, including easy, medium, and hard, with specific conditions such as "Equal", "Less Than", and "Greater Than" that players must meet to progress. The article provides hints and answers for each difficulty level for the date April 14, 2026.

U.S. Military Conducts Successful Strike, Eliminating Two Suspected Cartel Operatives in Eastern Pacific, Reports SOUTHCOM
US military kills 2 suspected cartel operatives in latest Eastern Pacific lethal strike, SOUTHCOM says
U.S. kills two in Pacific strike of alleged drug-trafficking boat
U.S. military kills 2 in another alleged drug boat strike in eastern Pacific

items.summary: The US military carried out a lethal strike in the Eastern Pacific, killing two suspected cartel operatives believed to be involved in narcotics trafficking. The strike, conducted by Joint Task Force Southern Spear, targeted a vessel operated by a designated terrorist organization that was engaged in narco-trafficking operations. This is the latest in a series of strikes aimed at disrupting cartel-linked trafficking networks at sea.
